title: AI Marketing Error Tracking Tools Review: Sentry vs Bugsnag vs Rollbar for Small Business - 2026
description: Review Sentry, Bugsnag, Rollbar, and other AI marketing error tracking tools for bug monitoring and alert management. Find the best marketing error tracking solution!
content:
Error Tracking Challenges for Small Businesses

Small businesses need error tracking: bug monitoring, alert management, crash reporting. Error tracking tools enable bug detection, real-time alerts, and performance monitoring.

Core Features Comparison

FeaturesSentryBugsnagRollbarRaygun
AI FeaturesLimitedLimitedLimitedLimited
Bug MonitoringBestStrongMediumStrong
Small Business FriendlyStrongBestStrongMedium
Alert ManagementBestStrongStrongBest
Price$26/month$29/month$19/month$19/month

Sentry Overview

Sentry is a leading tool for small businesses, offering professional Error Tracking features.

  • Core Capabilities: Professional Error Tracking, user-friendly interface, comprehensive features
  • Advantages: Small business friendly, professional features, easy to use
  • Disadvantages: Limited AI features, pricing considerations
  • Price: Starting from competitive rates

Summary Comparison

ToolFeaturesSmall Business FriendlyPriceBest For
SentryStrongStrong$26/monthBest Error Tracking
BugsnagStrongBest$29/monthFor small businesses

Recommendations

For small businesses, choose Bugsnag for small business friendly features. For best Error Tracking, choose Sentry. For analysis, choose Rollbar. For enterprise, choose Raygun. We recommend Bugsnag for small businesses combined with Sentry for best Error Tracking, for optimal results.
author: Error Tracking Analyst
